{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044653205AAA23B88C8B3E2143"}"},"total":13},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7140029516239422223","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情非常棒，太精彩绝伦"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1662417743,"group_id":"7136493981982002206","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3355331824209639"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7136493981982002206","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.334654e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":494,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3828,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7137433949659874048","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常棒，能把末世小说写的非常厉害的，我太佩服了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1661813438,"group_id":"7136493981982002206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"成为一个小说家，让大家都能看到我的书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NywHJ62a/AUPiaaiCn7cImJMqk63gzV97ZuTFSc0VmiD","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/912d853818d640c1a2fa254baba914cf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702366&x-signature=uvNNVXeXSmJf3F1D0e2yau4Ytgw%3D","user_id":"3355331824209639","user_name":"王之刃浩宇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3355331824209639","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7136493981982002206","book_info":{"abstract":"【杀伐果断的三人组，哼，从不放过任何该死之人！就算仅仅骂我一句的，那也得死！】
末世降临，三人组意外再次重逢。他们三人通过绑架初为觉醒者的南城，开启了自己的觉醒之路。
就在他们在这个末世一路横行，斩丧尸，灭怪物，尽情杀戮的时候，意外遇到了身为二次觉醒者的雾渊。
“咱们阴他一把！逼问出他是怎么二次觉醒的。”   老楚兴奋的说到。
在经历了一番困难之后，他们终于二次觉醒，随着实力的不断增长，他们逐渐的开始了解这个末世的真相。
一场庞大的阴谋，迫在眉睫的危险，以及强悍到连他们都前所未见的敌人，使他们渐渐的明白，一场浩劫即将来临......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ac3bd3ec37f474a6b8e0c77982a549b0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"末世指南","author_id":"","book_id":"7136493981982002206","book_name":"末世之超凶三人组","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7136494354977260065","read_count":"158","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"215107"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"104","tags":"科幻末世,末世,求生,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ac3bd3ec37f474a6b8e0c77982a549b0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779310014&x-signature=MNRHYR06yvj9o5qWi4F49enS1Ao%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4029083154916020","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"903032"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044653205AAA23B88C8B3E2143"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1094},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1664666384,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"u
